name: redpen
description: Personal language-learning helper for coco/Trae CLI (English / Chinese / Spanish / Japanese).

plugins.name: redpen-coco
plugins.description: Score + rewrite each user prompt in your chosen target language via a user_prompt_submit hook. Native `coco --print` pipeline, default model Kimi-K2.5. Output via systemMessage (visible to you only, not added to the model's context).
